Anything that you've been doing that's that's made the pain worse? If I. Think I have to take really really slow and shallow breaths. No, I would say just on the left side. OK, and has the pain been getting worse, staying the same or getting better? I'd say over the last two hours it's been getting worse. OK, and do you have any other associated symptoms? Uh, like I think I I'm having. Also maybe it's just because I'm trying to breathe slowly, but I feel like I can't catch my breath. No, I've been pretty pretty healthy recently. No, no cough or no infections. OK, and uh, any dizziness? Um no. Alright, and I know you mentioned the few scratches on your hands, but any other injuries? Oh no, I I think I got a pretty lucky. Oh, OK. Um no nothing like that. Alright, and, when was the last time you had anything to eat or drink? I just had some cereal and, um, just some chocolate milk around breakfast time but nothing else. OK, and how many hours ago was that? I would say around 3 hours ago. OK. Um, and have you been diagnosed with any medical conditions in the past? Uh, not other than just a hay fever, but nothing nothing else. I have like a lot of allergies. Any allergies to medications? Yeah, it's just like sometimes on the weekend. I'll just have a beer or two while watching the game, but not nothing regular. OK, thank you.
